Tip of the day
Equipping a gear set while at a bank will automatically withdraw all the items from the bank.

Chest of Syrenthia

Chest of Syrenthia
Type: Container
Keyword: Chest

The chest of the deep underwater world must hold plenty of aquatic treasures.

Chest of Syrenthia is an openable treasury item. It can be received as rewards from Job Boards and Faction Reputation.

Loot Tables

These are the sub-tables for the various materials, coins, and items that can come from these chests.

These treasury items make 4 independent loot rolls when they are opened.

Main Loot Table

71.640% Per Roll (99.353% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Pearls 2-4 23.110% 65.047% ~1 in 2 22 (44-88)
Sea shell 6-12 23.110% 65.047% ~1 in 2 5 (30-60)
Salty hops 1-2 11.555% 38.808% ~1 in 3 2 (2-4)
Kelp rolls 1 4.622% 17.245% ~1 in 6 7 (7)
Saltrum 1 4.622% 17.245% ~1 in 6 7 (7)
Underwater salad 1 4.622% 17.245% ~1 in 6 10 (10)

Common Loot Table

20.000% Per Roll (59.040% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Bubble bauble 1 10.000% 34.390% ~1 in 3 2 (2)
Merfolk shell coverings 1 10.000% 34.390% ~1 in 3 2 (2)

Uncommon Loot Table

5.000% Per Roll (18.549% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Map of Syrenthia 1 1.667% 6.503% ~1 in 15 11 (11)
Merfolk dance leglets 1 1.667% 6.503% ~1 in 15 25 (25)
Pearl bracelet 1 1.667% 6.503% ~1 in 15 2 (2)

2.500% Per Roll (9.631% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Merfolk dance bracers 1 1.250% 4.907% ~1 in 20 28 (28)
Merfolk dance skirt 1 1.250% 4.907% ~1 in 20 28 (28)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Merfolk dance corslet 1 0.375% 1.492% ~1 in 67 84 (84)
Tidal lure 1 0.375% 1.492% ~1 in 67 7 (7)

Legendary Loot Table

0.100% Per Roll (0.399% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest) 		Odds Value
Merfolk dance circlet 1 0.100% 0.399% ~1 in 251 120 (120)

0.010% Per Roll (0.040% Per Chest)

Item Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance

Algae ring 1 0.010% 0.040% ~1 in 2,500 7 (7)

Sources

Faction Reward

Faction Name Quantity Requirements
Syrenthia 1 5 Syrenthia Faction Reputation
Syrenthia 2 10 Syrenthia Faction Reputation
Syrenthia 3 20 Syrenthia Faction Reputation
Syrenthia 4 30 Syrenthia Faction Reputation
Syrenthia 5 45 Syrenthia Faction Reputation

Faction Repeating Reward

Faction Name Quantity Requirement
Syrenthia 1 Every 3 Faction Reputation

Job Board Payment

Job Board Name Location Quantity Job Request Item Type
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 4x Cooked squid
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 298x Coral
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 112x Coral plank
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 2x Hydrilium diving helm
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 1x Hydrilium diving leggings
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 1x Hydrilium diving torso
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 17x Kelp
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 1x Kelp diving shirt
Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 1x Pearls

Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 4x Raw squid

Vastalume job board Vastalume 1 164x Sea shell
